/markings/

The markings

Every kind of mark found in these books, and how often it appears across the Penn holdings. For where in the book each one turns up — including the places nobody looks — see where to look.

OAD stamp
Offenbach Archival Depot
Title page, its verso, and the last-page verso
1180 books→
JCR bookplate
Jewish Cultural Reconstruction
Front pastedown
512 books→
Gutter source note
“Gift of JCR”
Gutter behind the title page
276 books→
ERR stamp
Einsatzstab Reichsleiter Rosenberg
Title page and front pastedown
61 books→
Johannes Pohl pastedown
ERR (Pohl)
Front pastedown
18 books→
Disinfection stamp
Offenbach intake
Flyleaf and title-page verso
143 books→
AJDC Library stamp
the “Joint”
Inside back board (lower)
208 books→
Pre-war owner stamps
personal & institutional
Throughout — title page, boards, flyleaf
690 books→
Penn Libraries · Provenance of looted books · prototypeUncertainty in this record is shown, not hidden.
